title: Automate timeline dates (especially Start) based on completion of task/item in a Group
excerpt: Is it possible to automate the timeline of all or majority of tasks/items in 1 or all groups of a board, based on the completion date of task/item 1 (Contract Signed)? The completion date is prefilled with the date the s…

posts.author: andrewc02 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to automate the timeline of all or majority of tasks/items in 1 or all groups of a board, based on the completion date of task/item 1 (Contract Signed)? The completion date is prefilled with the date the status of “Completed” is applied.

image1646×198 25.4 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Andrew!

This isn’t possible in the exact way you describe but it sounds like something we could figure out a workaround for!

To do this, could you share what you’re ultimately looking to achieve with this process so we can figure out another angle to come at this issue with?

posts.author: andrewc02 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlotte,

We’re looking to have 4 x users with the ability to create/edit/delete boards.

Regards

Andrew
